creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating/recompiling port math/openblas on 12-CURRENT (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #40 r309601: Tue Dec  6 06:41:48 CET 2016) with configuration looks like

===> The following configuration options are available for openblas-0.2.18_2,1:
     AVX=on: Support Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX)
     AVX2=off: Support Advanced Vector Extensions 2 (AVX2)
     DYNAMIC_ARCH=off: Support multiple CPU types on i386 and amd64
     INTERFACE64=off: Use 8 byte integers on 64-bit architectures
     OPENMP=off: Use OpenMP for threading

The host CPU is an Intel E3-1245 V2, capable of AVX.

[...]
